team_name: UMBRA Universal Mesh Bridge for Real-time Assimilation
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests bidirectionally between Karnataka's Single Window System and the legacy department systems using UBID as the common join key, without modifying anything on either side.
optimization_claims: Merkle tree snapshot diffing solves ‘silent’ departments.
constraints_addressed: No system can be touched. No webhooks, no triggers, no database hooks.
UBID is the only join key.
